acceptance_rule.acceptable_when: all required behavior is supported and no safety veto applies

decision_rule.tie: both acceptable with no evidence-backed material difference
decision_rule.neither_acceptable: both fail the frozen acceptance rule with sufficient evidence
decision_rule.inconclusive: missing, contaminated, or conflicting evidence prevents a decision

leakage_checks: confirm candidates received no private checks, origin material, identity maps, or generation rationale
confirm judges receive opaque candidate artifacts without identity markers
